summary: Some graphic design fun for the weekend: achingly gorgeous art pieces recreating vintage Pan Am luggage tags, by Ella Freire. I love them all. The colors, the type, the shapes — sublime. ( Via Dan Cederholm’s Studio Notes .) ★
title: Pan American Luggage Labels
